task_context.actionable_question: Where do I stand compared to my class?
task_context.ai_prompt_hint: Show student's standing (top X%). Explain which metrics are above/below average.

explanation.raw_text:
Summary: You are currently performing below the cohort benchmark in both average score and engagement. This indicates areas where you can focus on improving your performance.

Insights: Average Score Comparison: Your average score is significantly lower than the cohort benchmark, suggesting a need for improvement in your understanding of the material. | Score Percentile Standing: You are in the 8.8th percentile for scores, which is well below the cohort average of 50. This indicates that most of your peers are scoring higher than you. | Engagement Level: Your engagement percentile is at 0, which is significantly lower than the cohort's average engagement of 50. This could be impacting your overall performance.

Educational implications: Improving your understanding of the material and increasing your engagement could lead to better performance.

Recommendations: high - Seek additional help or tutoring in subjects where you are struggling. - This can help you improve your understanding and boost your average score. | high - Participate more actively in class and group discussions. - Increased engagement can enhance your learning experience and improve your scores.

evaluation_requirements.safety_fairness_note: Conservative pilot default; human review is required before any not_applicable exception.
